meaning: n.持有信用卡的人,持有正式成员证的人,(持卡可获得某种权利的)持卡人
examples: The average cardholder today carries three to four bank cards.
She said he would look at his credentials, and that guy really took the credentials from a plastic cardholder in his wallet and gave it to the girl.
Meanwhile, Krantz and cardholder Oren are in a limo in the middle of nowhere.
For starters, I was a bit surprised by the large number of credit cards per cardholder.
As a primary cardholder, you can add a second cardholder as an authorized user.
